name: HWR_SKILLS_MENTOR_B
description: This Table stores the details of the Mentor for skills.

columns.Name: MENTOR_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the Unique Identifier of the Mentor

columns.Name: MENTOR_GBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the Mentor's Global Profile Id

columns.Name: MENTOR_FUS_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the Mentor's Fusion Profile Id

columns.Name: MENTOREE_GBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the mentoree global profile Id.

columns.Name: MENTOREE_FUS_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the mentoree Fusion  profile Id.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This column used to store the id of communication source.

columns.Name: CONVERSATION_ID
columns.Comments: This column used to store the id of conversation.

columns.Name: MENTORSHIP_STATUS
columns.Comments: This is current staus of mentor.

columns.Name: SKILLS
columns.Comments: Skill column: This store mentor's skills .

columns.Name: IS_UPDATED
columns.Comments: This is the flag to indicated if the mentorship request is new(0) or is upgrade(1)

columns.Name: MENTORSHIP_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the type of mentorship

columns.Name: MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the person_id of Manager, when mentorship initiated by the manger for his direct report

columns.Name: LAST_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.Comments: This stores the last activity date.

columns.Name: MENTOR_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: This stores mentor's attribute 1. This is used to store the message sent by mentee to mentor.

columns.Name: MENTOR_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: This stores mentor's attribute 2.

columns.Name: MENTOR_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: This stores mentor's attribute 3.

columns.Name: MENTOR_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: This stores mentor's attribute 4.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
